mapper.select:
SELECT o.* FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_house h ON o.house_id = h.id
AND (o.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR h.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR o.guest_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR o.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%'))
AND o.status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY o.create_time DESC
